aeo_readiness.summary: Aloha Air Conditioning has a decent foundation for AEO readiness with clear service offerings and some SEO-friendly elements. However, there are several areas for improvement to enhance visibility and user engagement.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve local SEO.
Implement a blog section with relevant, keyword-optimized content to increase organic traffic.
Ensure all service pages have unique, descriptive meta titles and descriptions.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes location-based keywords like 'HVAC Las Vegas' and mentions service areas such as Henderson, North Las Vegas, and Summerlin.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a good start with location-based keywords, but it lacks depth in localized content and specific service area targeting.
critical_issues: No dedicated location pages for each service area.
Missing structured data for LocalBusiness, which is crucial for local SEO.

nap_citations.summary: The website provides a phone number and address implicitly through the contact context, but there is no explicit NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information.
action_items: Add a dedicated contact page with complete NAP information.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online directories and platforms.
Include a Google Map embed on the contact page for better local signals.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Potential customers searching for HVAC services in Las Vegas who rely on reviews and ratings.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation system and showcasing testimonials prominently on the website.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content that establishes the business as a trusted expert in the HVAC industry.

page_title: HVAC Las Vegas | Heating Repair & Installation | Aloha Air Conditioning
